info.name: GreenRoots API — Full Test Suite
info.description:
Complete test suite for the GreenRoots Urban Farming Platform API.

**Setup:**
1. Set base_url variable to http://localhost:4000
2. Run 'Auth / Register Admin' or 'Auth / Login as Admin' first
3. Tokens are auto-saved to collection variables

**Variables used:**
- base_url
- admin_token
- vendor_token
- customer_token
- vendor_id
- produce_id
- order_id
- post_id
- rental_id
- cert_id
- plant_log_id

body.raw:
{
  "name": "Organic Tomatoes",
  "description": "Fresh sun-ripened organic tomatoes grown without pesticides.",
  "price": 85.00,
  "category": "Vegetables",
  "availableQuantity": 150
}
